topIngredients.name: Retinol + Niacinamide Blend
topIngredients.benefit: Niacinamide counteracts retinol irritation while boosting its efficacy

topIngredients.name: Vitamin B3 (Niacinamide)
topIngredients.benefit: Strengthens barrier to allow better retinol tolerance for beginners

verdict: Olay Retinol 24 solves the retinol-irritation problem by pairing it with niacinamide. The fragrance-free formula is one of the most beginner-friendly retinol moisturizers with genuine anti-aging results.
